airport.name: Shenzhen Bao'an International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 11 to city center; about 30 minutes. Or use Didi app.

transport.metro: Download Shenzhen Metro app or use Baidu Maps. Buy tickets or use Shenzhentong card.
transport.taxi: Use Didi app for convenience. Taxis accept cash and Alipay.
transport.didi: Register with international number; pay via WeChat or Alipay.

payment.alipay: Link foreign credit card; use for payments in stores.
payment.wechatPay: Set up with foreign card; scan QR codes.
payment.cash: Carry small bills; some places prefer mobile pay.
payment.foreignCard: Accepted in malls and hotels; use cash elsewhere.

tips: Use Ctrip or Booking.com for deals.
Try street food for authentic taste.

commonScams: Fake taxi meters; use official taxis.
Overcharging in tourist spots; confirm prices.
Pickpockets in crowded areas; guard belongings.

emergency.localTip: Download 'Shenzhen Emergency' app for local help.

bestTimeToVisit: Visit from October to December for mild weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Use translation apps like Baidu Translate.
